description: 재난 및 안전관리 기본법 and 위험물안전관리법 confirmed real via legalize_kr; each of the 6 위험물안전관리법-citing workflows given a specific article (Art 27/22-2 for leak-response types, Art 5 for storage/handling types); 환경보전법 replaced with 산업안전보건법 Article 125 (Work Environment Measurement) in both affected files; 신재생에너지법 replaced with canonical 신에너지 및 재생에너지 개발·이용·보급 촉진법 Article 12.
